basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Sports Coaches Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) has released the official Sports Coaches Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Bhilai Sports Coaches Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis. Candidates with a Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education, Graduation with a Diploma in Sports Coaching (NIS/SAI), XII Pass with Sports Federation certification, or Board of Intermediate qualification for Groundsmen, along with the prescribed experience, are eligible to attend the walkin interview on 22 July 2026. The official notification PDF

age_limit.details: Coach: No Age Limit Groundsman: should not exceed 35 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with minimum 2 years coaching experience, Graduation with Diploma in Sports Coaching (NIS/SAI) with minimum 2 years experience, XII Pass with Sports Federation certification and minimum 3 years coaching experience, Board of Intermediate for Groundsmen
qualification.details: Cricket Coach, Football Coach, Basketball Coach, Volleyball Coach, Badminton Coach, Table Tennis Coach: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with a minimum of 2 years of coaching experience in the relevant sport OR Graduation in any subject with a Diploma in Sports Coaching (NIS/SAI or any other recognized institution) in the relevant sport, with a minimum of 2 years of coaching experience OR XII Pass with certification from the respective Sports Federation / Six-week Certificate Course in Sports Coaching from (NIS), and representation at the National / State / University level, with a minimum of 3 years of coaching experience in the relevant sport. Groundsmen: Board of Intermediate; Knowledge of field marking and maintenance of equipment tools; Physically fit and capable of outdoor work.

salary_details.details: Cricket Coach, Football Coach, Basketball Coach, Volleyball Coach, Badminton Coach, Table Tennis Coach: Rs. 25,000/- per month (Consolidated) Groundsmen: Rs. 18,000/- per month (Consolidated)

selection_process: Walk-In Interview Document Verification Personal Interview

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Bhilai Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_bhilai_ii: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with minimum 2 years coaching experience, Graduation with Diploma in Sports Coaching (NIS/SAI) with minimum 2 years experience, XII Pass with Sports Federation certification and minimum 3 years coaching experience, Board of Intermediate for Groundsmen

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Bhilai Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Bhilai Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Cricket Coach, Football Coach, Basketball Coach, Volleyball Coach, Badminton Coach, Table Tennis Coach: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with a minimum of 2 years of coaching experience in the relevant sport OR Graduation in any subject with a Diploma in Sports Coaching (NIS/SAI or any other recognized institution) in the relevant sport, with a minimum of 2 years of coaching experience OR XII Pass with certification from the respective Sports Federation / Six-week Certificate Course in Sports Coaching from (NIS), and representation at the National / State / University level, with a minimum of 3 years of coaching experience in the relevant sport. Groundsmen: Board of Intermediate; Knowledge of field marking and maintenance of equipment tools; Physically fit and capable of outdoor work.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Coach: No Age Limit Groundsman: should not exceed 35 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Cricket Coach, Football Coach, Basketball Coach, Volleyball Coach, Badminton Coach, Table Tennis Coach: Rs. 25,000/- per month (Consolidated) Groundsmen: Rs. 18,000/- per month (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-In Interview Document Verification Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sports Coaches and Groundsmen posts at IIT Bhilai is scheduled for 22nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: IIT Bhilai has announced a total of 8 vacancies for the positions of Sports Coaches and Groundsmen. These vacancies are distributed across various sports coaching roles and groundsmen positions.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sports Coach positions?
faq.answer: For Sports Coach positions, candidates need a Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with 2 years of experience, or a Diploma in Sports Coaching with 2 years of experience, or XII Pass with Sports Federation certification and 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What are the age criteria for the Sports Coaches and Groundsmen posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data. Age relaxation details are not available.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Sports Coaches and Groundsmen positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Sports Coaches is Rs. 25,000/- per month, and for Groundsmen, it is Rs. 18,000/- per month. Both are consolidated monthly payments.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is strictly Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is IIT Bhilai located in?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) is located in Durg, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 491002.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-In Interview, followed by Document Verification, and a Personal Interview. Candidates need to clear all stages to be considered for the positions.
